text:
is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise. 

__TOC__

Profile

He is a First Lieutenant at NERV and one of the three main computer technicians directly serving under Commanders Ikari and Fuyutsuki in the command post of Central Dogma, the others being Aoba and Ibuki.

Makoto Hyuga at first gives the impression of being something of an otaku, reading manga while on his break time, but is a highly skilled technician. 

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion

His quick thinking and bravery help save NERV Headquarters from the attack by Matarael, and he acts as a spy for Misato, helping her obtain information regarding NERV's machinations. 

The End of Evangelion

The true extent of his feelings for Misato is shown in The End of Evangelion as Rei/Lilith takes the form of Misato during Instrumentality and passionately kisses him; his body reverts to LCL.

In Other Media

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku, Makoto works as a teacher of modern literature during the day, but he is actually a NERV member as his real ocupation. Neon Genesis Evangelion: Gakuen Datenroku Volume 3, chapter 12 

Rebuild of Evangelion

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA
